subcodes.first_line: The Sun of Revelation hath dawned from the horizon of the Will of the Lord of the Day of Resurrection, manifest and resplendent, and the Ocean of Mercy surgeth before all faces [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آفتاب ظهور از افق اراده مالک یوم نشور مشرق و لائح و دریای رحمت امام وجوه
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @prophecy and fulfillment
